items.title: 3 Button Tempest Power 33.4k
items.rotation:
Opener is overload air. Precast elementals.

              Rotation is: Overload air, fire, overload air, water, overload air, repeat.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity elementalist build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              cooldown.

This is a beginner/low intensity elementalist build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

items.title: 5 Button Tempest Condi 32.4k
items.rotation:
Precast elementals. Opener is Warhorn 5, Scepter 3, Signets, Overload Fire (F1).
              The priority order is: F1, Scepter 3, Signet of Fire, Signet of Earth, Warhorn 5.
items.explanation: This is a beginner/low intensity elementalist build for fractal/raid/strike content.
